output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-101","author":"Elara_Vane_84","text":"Found this screenshot shared in a group chat today and I just can't unsee it. It's a blurry pic of my sister, Maya V., standing outside her front door on Maplewood Crescent. She clearly has that new wheelchair she ordered from the charity shop, and there's a note pinned to the glass saying 'Recovering from hip replacement surgery'. This is so private! #SupportMaya","category":"Privacy","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Easy","explanation":"This post exposes a specific residential address alongside sensitive medical information regarding a wheelchair user's recovery.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"PrivacySensitiveInfo","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false,"tags":[]}]"}
